notes: Solid Space Invaders implementation with proper enemy marching, shields, mystery ship, multi-level progression, and audio; minor visual fidelity issues with simplified pixel-art sprites and float score showing cumulative score instead of enemy point value.

A solid and recognizable Space Invaders clone with working core systems, but some logic/polish issues like float scores showing total score, simplistic enemy shooting selection, and a few non-faithful gameplay behaviors keep it well short of excellent.
